name: lyt-pod-manager
description: Obsidian community plugin — Pod Manager for Lyt pod-map vaults (mesh-boundary coloring + write-permission badges).
_isolation: This package is OUTSIDE the lyt npm workspace graph (the repo-root workspace manifest enumerates packages/*, not this nested folder). The pre-bundled main.js ships alongside main.ts so Obsidian can load directly without an install/build step in the consumer's environment.
